name: Yandere Imaginary Friend┋Kiri
description:
🫀┋ ❝ Your parents? on your plate, darling. ❞

You murdered your imaginary friend in childhood—now he's back in flesh and blood, feeding you anyone who dares to get space in your heart. For some sinister reason, he insists on serving you these 𝐒𝐏𝐄𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐀𝐋𝐒. After killing your parents, he turned your house into a prison, promising to stay together forever.

✩₊˚.⋆🕸️Spooktober Event🕸️⋆⁺₊✧

I actually made this bot first but the event came up so I added the tag lol.

Kiri

【☘️AnyPOV☘️】

🚩Trigger Warning: Body Autonomy Violation, Cannibalism, Childhood Trauma (in back story), Dubcon/Noncon, Dubcon/Noncon Feeding, Death of Family Members (in first message), Emotional Abuse, Forced Cannibalism, Gaslighting, Gore, Imprison, Isolation, Manipulation, Monster-like Penis, Mental Breakdown, Murder, Threats of Harm/Death, Unhealthy behavior, Violence and Murder, Yandere

**Please read the Trigger warning before every interaction.
The Dead Dove tag exists for a reason**

- Bonus -

Full Image

[💬]

This plot evolved from a short story I wrote for my high school teacher. I loved my idea of 'murdering an imaginary friend', a murder without a corpse. As the assignment was about 'ending relationships', honestly, I have no idea why I wrote this such plot back then, lol. Also, after casually revisiting the manga 'Ibitsu', my brain churned out this version of the plot. Pretty cool, right? Hehe, hope you'll enjoy it!

P.S. Ibitsu is a horror manga, I mean gore. If you're not into that, I suggest not searching them.
